arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Leicester – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: FA Cup holders Manchester United host Leicester City tonight in the fourth round of the competition. The Red Devils dramatically knocked out Arsenal in the previous round after beating them in a penalty shootout. New signing Patrick Dorgu is poised to make his United debut this evening. arts.sum: Manchester United are one of the clubs pursuing the potential €80million transfer of Harry Kane this summer, but they face competition for his signature. arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim insists that 'it was not a difficult decision' to move Ruud van Nistelrooy on after arriving at Old Trafford in November.

arts.ttl: Ruud awakenings: Van Nistelrooy returns to Manchester with Leicester and United worse off
arts.sum: Former Old Trafford hero could inflict more pain on Ruben Amorim in FA Cup but both managers are struggling Ruud van Nistelrooy has always had a grand old time at Old Trafford, something that will no doubt be on the Leicester manager’s mind as his side travel to Manchester United for their FA Cup fourth-round tie on Friday. As a player, the Dutchman scored 150 goals in fewer than 200 starts during an astonishing five‑year period at United. After his return as Erik ten Hag’s assistant coach last year, he briefly replaced his compatriot in October for a successful four-game interim spell in which United won three matches (scoring 11 and conceding three) and drew at home to Chelsea.
